docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $800.00 FILED BY SU, JONG-CHYI AS TO DEFENDANT EMERALD FUND, INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-14-2025 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED FEB-24-2025, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON CORPORATION AS TO DEFENDANT EMERALD FUND, INC.
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) HIBA HAMMADI FILED BY DEFENDANT EMERALD FUND, INC.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-14-2025 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO APR-30-2025 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506 BY VISITING JUDGE: JOHN TRUE. APPEARANCES: PLAINTIFF JONG-CHYI SU IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT EMERALD FUND, INC. (REPRESENTED BY HIBA HAMMADI) IS PRESENT. PARTIES HAVE AGREED TO DISCUSS A SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. NO APPEARANCE BY THE PARTIES WILL BE A DISMISSAL WITH PREJUDICE. CASE SETTLED. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. NOT REPORTED.

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE BY VISITING JUDGE JOHN TRUE. APPEARANCES: PLAINTIFF JONG-CHYI SU IS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT EMERALD FUND, INC. IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. NOT REPORTED (D506)
